chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1483 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6261/2023 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 08.11.2023 Petitioners are present in person. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, AAG Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Abdul Hameed Mangi, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.6, whereas, statements have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 and 4, which are taken on record. Respondent No.5 (Inspector Khalid Hussain Dahiri, Investigating Officer of Crime No.107 of 2023 registered at Police Station Lakhi Ghulam Shah, District Shikarpur under Sections 365-B PPC and 3 of Prevention of Trafficking in Persons Act, 2018) is present, files a copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Saima (Petitioner No.1) recorded under Section 161 CrPC, and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Abdul Wahid (Petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her mother (Respondent No.6) has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. Investigating Officer further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law. Both the petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer do not press this petition.

Investigating Officer further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law. Both the petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
